mapping_metadata.analyzer: Senior Test Automation Mapping Specialist Agent

test_case_mappings.test_case_description: Test case to verify the Billing Cycle Period card display and behavior on Print and Payment History page when a subscription plan is paused, including verification of complimentary pages progress bar, additional pages tracking, tooltips, and page usage information display across different printing scenarios.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Enroll the Ink printer with 50 pages plan or higher.
precondition_mapping.notes: This precondition requires printer enrollment with a specific plan tier. Batch 15 contains ShipmentTrackingPage which tracks ink cartridge shipments, but does not contain any methods for enrolling printers or setting up subscription plans. No API helpers, enrollment methods, or plan setup utilities were found in this batch. The required enrollment functionality likely exists in a different batch containing subscription management or printer setup modules.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the Subscription has no free months info.
precondition_mapping.notes: This precondition requires verifying subscription state (no free months). Batch 15 contains ShippingBillingPage which manages billing and payment methods, but does not contain any methods to verify subscription details, check free months status, or query subscription state. No API helpers or subscription verification methods were found. The required subscription state verification likely exists in a different batch containing subscription management or API helper modules.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the subscription is "subscribed" status.
precondition_mapping.notes: This precondition requires verifying subscription status is 'subscribed'. Batch 15 does not contain any methods to get subscription status, verify subscription state, or query subscription details via API or UI. The ShippingBillingPage manages payment methods but does not provide subscription status verification. The required subscription status checking likely exists in a different batch containing subscription management or API helper modules.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Click the Pause Plan button on CIT modal or "Pause Instant Ink" link to trigger the pause plan.
precondition_mapping.notes: This precondition requires clicking a Pause Plan button or Pause Instant Ink link. Batch 15 does not contain any page objects with pause plan buttons, CIT modal elements, or pause instant ink links. None of the 5 page objects in this batch (ShipmentTrackingPage, ShippingBillingPage, SignInPage, ThankYouPage, TermsOfServiceHPSmartPage) contain locators or methods for pausing subscription plans. The required pause plan functionality likely exists in a different batch containing subscription management or dashboard page objects.

files_checked_in_this_batch: AURA-main (1) 1/AURA-main/pages/shipment_tracking_page.py - ShipmentTrackingPage with 26 locators for tracking ink cartridge and paper shipments, FAQ sections, and shipment history table
AURA-main (1) 1/AURA-main/pages/shipping_billing_page.py - ShippingBillingPage with 38 locators for managing shipping addresses and payment methods including forms, validation, and billing modals
AURA-main (1) 1/AURA-main/pages/sign_in_page.py - SignInPage with 4 locators for email/password authentication in a two-step sign-in flow
AURA-main (1) 1/AURA-main/pages/thank_you_page.py - ThankYouPage with 6 locators for confirmation page after completing workflows
AURA-main (1) 1/AURA-main/pages/tos_hp_smart_page.py - TermsOfServiceHPSmartPage with 1 locator for terms of service acceptance
test_case_mappings.no_match_reason: Test case C44873414 requires interaction with the Print and Payment History page under HP Instant Ink, specifically the Billing Cycle Period card component with complimentary pages progress bar, additional pages progress bar, tooltips, page usage tracking, and related UI elements. This batch contains 5 page objects: (1) ShipmentTrackingPage - tracks ink cartridge and paper shipments with FAQ and history table, (2) ShippingBillingPage - manages shipping addresses and payment methods, (3) SignInPage - handles user authentication, (4) ThankYouPage - displays confirmation after workflows, (5) TermsOfServiceHPSmartPage - handles terms acceptance. NONE of these page objects represent the Print and Payment History page required by the test case. The test requires 21 steps involving: navigating to Print and Payment History page, verifying billing cycle period card, checking plan pause information display, interacting with complimentary pages progress bar (black color, 0-10 used), hovering/clicking info icons to show tooltips, printing pages to update usage, verifying additional pages progress bar (yellow color, 5 of 10 used), checking total pages printed, and visual/responsive verification. Batch 15 contains NO locators for: billing_cycle_period_card, plan_pause_information_text, complimentary_pages_progress_bar, complimentary_pages_info_icon, complimentary_pages_tooltip, complimentary_pages_value_text, additional_pages_progress_bar, additional_pages_info_icon, additional_pages_tooltip, total_pages_printed_text, or any other elements on the Print and Payment History page. The batch also contains NO methods for: navigating to print/payment history, verifying progress bars, interacting with tooltips, checking page usage values, verifying colors, or any other actions required by the test. The ShipmentTrackingPage tracks shipments AFTER they occur but does not display billing cycle information or page usage tracking. The ShippingBillingPage manages billing addresses and payment methods but does not display billing cycle period cards or page usage. The required Print and Payment History page object with all billing cycle period card elements likely exists in a different batch containing HP Instant Ink dashboard or subscription management page objects.
